productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men KX TR Black Sports Shoes
description: Tear up your all-terrain running in these men's adidas KX Trail shoes. They maximise your overland training with TRAXION® , which provides grip without excessive pressure points on the foot. Upper Air mesh upper for maximum breathability Synthetic overlays for support and durability Asymmetric lace-up system with high-grip cord laces to provide a customised Fit Comfortable textile lining Anatomically engineered footbed which is removable to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Injected EVA midsole for long-term, lightweight cushioning adiPRENE® under the heel for superior cushioning at impact Outsole adiWEAR® outsole offers the ultimate in high-wear durability TRAXION® outsole for maximum grip in all directions Mud release surface made up of lugs which act as cleats &ndash gripping the ground without getting clogged with mud shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
